author: danceratopz
content:
## execution-specs build tool migration: `tox` → `just`

*This post is only relevant for [ethereum/execution-specs](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs) devs and contributors!*

The execution-specs repo has migrated its build tool from **tox** to **[just](https://just.systems)**. `just` is a lighter task runner, with some similarities to `make`, but improved developer ergonomics.

### Installing `just`

**Minimum required version: 1.43**

Please consult the [installation docs](https://just.systems/man/en/packages.html) and its package manager versioning table - e.g., the version included in Ubuntu 24.04 is too old; there are many alternative installation paths (cargo, snap, curl, etc.). On macOS: `brew install just`.

### What changed

The old tox environment names have been normalized and improved. Run `just` to see all available recipes - they should be self-explanatory. If you're coming from tox, you can also run `tox -e old_env_name` to find out the corresponding new recipe name.

### Highlights

- **`just static`** - parallelized static checks (runs mypy, ruff, codespell, etc. concurrently).
- **`just fix`** - applies automatic formatting and safe lint fixes in one step.
- **`just fill tests/istanbul/eip1344_chainid/`** - easy argument pass-through to limit test set and speed up collection.
- **Tab completion** - `just li<tab>` completes recipe names; setup instructions at [shell-completion-scripts](https://just.systems/man/en/shell-completion-scripts.html).

### More Info

- [ethereum/execution-specs#2555 - feat(ci,tooling): replace `tox` with `just`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2555).
- [ethereum/execution-specs#2559 - Task Runner Comparison: Re-evaluating `tox`](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/discussions/2559).
- [CONTRIBUTING.md dev section](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/blob/8ae9dcc11a95c9ee9a24ab2f94fd9b59d41edef6/CONTRIBUTING.md#development).

Happy hacking!
